privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: At Nexura Analytics, we take the protection of your personal information seriously. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your data, in accordance with Quebec Law 25 and federal PIPEDA.

collection.title: Information Collected
collection.content: We collect information you provide directly: name, email address, professional contact information, and data related to your assessment requests. We also automatically collect technical browsing data.

use.title: Use of Data
use.content: Your information is used to: respond to your requests, provide our automation services, improve our website, and send you communications if you have consented.

sharing.title: Data Sharing
sharing.content: We never sell your personal data. We may share your information with our service providers (hosting, payment, email) strictly within the scope of our operations.

retention.title: Retention
retention.content: We retain your data as long as necessary to provide our services or as required by applicable legal obligations.

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.content: You have the right to access your data, correct it, delete it, and withdraw your consent. To exercise these rights, contact us at privacy@nexura.ca.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: For any questions about this policy, write to us at privacy@nexura.ca or by mail to Nexura Analytics, Montreal, Quebec, Canada.

form.name: Your name
form.success: Thanks! We'll get back to you soon.
form.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

evaluation.title: Free Assessment
evaluation.subtitle: Discover what can be simplified in your operations.
evaluation.description: In 30 minutes, we analyze your processes together and identify tasks that can be automated. No commitment, no pressure.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: By using the Nexura Analytics website and services, you agree to these terms. These terms are governed by the laws of Quebec.

services.title: Description of Services
services.content: Nexura Analytics offers consulting and implementation services in business operations automation. Solutions are customized according to each client's needs.

obligations.title: Your Obligations
obligations.content: You agree to provide accurate information, use our services legally, and respect intellectual property rights.

payment.title: Payment
payment.content: Prices are indicated in Canadian dollars. Payment is due according to the terms agreed for each project. Applicable taxes are extra.

liability.title: Limitation of Liability
liability.content: Nexura Analytics cannot be held liable for indirect damages resulting from the use of our services. Our liability is limited to the amount paid for the services concerned.

ip.title: Intellectual Property
ip.content: Website content (text, images, logos) belongs to Nexura Analytics. Solutions developed for you belong to you, unless otherwise indicated.

termination.title: Termination
termination.content: We may suspend or terminate your access to services in case of violation of these terms.
